languages.text: "Так точно, Лорд-капитан. Генетор маджорис Ферренц от вашего лица преподнес мне истинный валанциусский дар. Полагаю, мой статус архмилитанта при Вашей Светлости сделал это возможным. Чувствую себя как героиня песни!"

"Yes, I have, Lord Captain. Genetor Majoris Ferrenz presented me with a true gift of von Valancius on your behalf. I suppose my status as Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s Arch-Militant had something to do with it. I feel like I've stepped right out of one of the songs!"
languages.original_text: "Так точно, Лорд-капитан. Генетор маджорис Ферренц от вашего лица преподнес мне истинный валанциусский дар. Полагаю, мой статус архмилитанта при Вашей Светлости сделал это возможным. Чувствую себя как героиня песни!"

traits.locale_text: "Yes, I have, Lord Captain. Genetor Majoris Ferrenz presented me with a true gift of the von Valancius on your behalf. I suppose my status as Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s Arch-Militant had something to do with it. I feel like I've stepped right out of the song!"

"Yes, I have, Lord Captain. Genetor Majoris Ferrenz presented me with a true gift of von Valancius on your behalf. I suppose my status as Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s Arch-Militant had something to do with it. I feel like I've stepped right out of one of the songs!"

"Yes, I have, Lord Captain. Chirurgeon Secundaris Genetor Ferrenz presented me with a true gift of the von Valancius on your behalf. I suppose my status as Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s Arch-Militant had something to do with it. What a pleasure it is to pick up something with this hand again!"

"Yes, I have, Lord Captain. Genetor Majoris Ferrenz presented me with a true gift of the von Valancius on your behalf. I suppose my status as Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s Arch-Militant had something to do with it. I feel like I've stepped right out of the song!"

"Yes, I have, Lord Captain. Genetor Majoris Ferrenz presented me with a true gift of von Valancius on your behalf. I suppose my status as Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s Arch-Militant had something to do with it. I feel like I've stepped right out of one of the songs!"

languages.text: 「ええ、受け取りました、艦長様。セカンドリス・ジェネター・フェレンツが、あなた様の名で、フォン・ヴァランシウス家の真の贈り物をお渡しくださいました。私のアーチ・ミリタントとしての地位が、その理由の一つだったのでしょう。この手で何かを手に入れる喜びは、本当に素晴らしいですね！」
languages.original_text: "Yes, I have, Lord Captain. Chirurgeon Secundaris Genetor Ferrenz presented me with a true gift of the von Valancius on your behalf. I suppose my status as Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s Arch-Militant had something to do with it. What a pleasure it is to pick up something with this hand again!"

languages.text: "Evet, değiştirdim Lord Kaptan. Genetör Majoris Ferrenz bana sizin adınıza gerçek bir von Valancius armağanı sundu. Sanırım {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri'nin Başmilitanı statümün bunda bir etkisi oldu. Şarkıdan fırlamış gibi hissediyorum!"
languages.original_text: "Yes, I have, Lord Captain. Genetor Majoris Ferrenz presented me with a true gift of von Valancius on your behalf. I suppose my status as Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s Arch-Militant had something to do with it. I feel like I've stepped right out of one of the songs!"

traits.locale_text: "Evet, değiştirdim Lord Kaptan. Genetör Majoris Ferrenz bana sizin adınıza gerçek bir von Valancius armağanı sundu. Sanırım {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri'nin Başmilitanı statümün bunda bir etkisi oldu. Şarkıdan fırlamış gibi hissediyorum!"

languages.text: “是的，舰长大人。高级基因士费伦茨以您的名义，赠予我一件真正的冯·瓦兰修斯的馈赠。我想这与我作为大人您的首席战士的身份有关。我感觉自己像生活在歌谣里一样。”
languages.original_text: "Yes, I have, Lord Captain. Genetor Majoris Ferrenz presented me with a true gift of von Valancius on your behalf. I suppose my status as Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s Arch-Militant had something to do with it. I feel like I've stepped right out of one of the songs!"

traits.locale_text: “是的，舰长大人。高级基因士费伦茨以您的名义，赠予我一件真正的冯·瓦兰修斯的馈赠。我想这与我作为大人您的首席战士的身份有关。我感觉自己像生活在歌谣里一样。”

languages.text: "Ja, Lord Captain. Genetor Majoris Ferrenz hat mir in Eurem Namen ein wahres Geschenk derer von Valancius gemacht. Ich nehme an, mein Status als Erzmilitantin Eurer {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft} hatte damit zu tun. Ich fühle mich als wäre ich einem der Lieder entsprungen!"
languages.original_text: "Yes, I have, Lord Captain. Genetor Majoris Ferrenz presented me with a true gift of von Valancius on your behalf. I suppose my status as Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s Arch-Militant had something to do with it. I feel like I've stepped right out of one of the songs!"

traits.locale_text: "Ja, Lord Captain. Genetor Majoris Ferrenz hat mir in Eurem Namen ein wahres Geschenk derer von Valancius gemacht. Ich nehme an, mein Status als Erzmilitantin Eurer {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft} hatte damit zu tun. Ich fühle mich als wäre ich einem der Lieder entsprungen!"

languages.text: « Oui, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Le genetor majoris Ferrenz m'a remis un véritable trésor des von Valancius en votre nom. Je suppose que mon statut d'archimilitante de Votre Seigneurie n'y est pas pour rien. J'ai l'impression d'être comme les héros des chansons ! »
languages.original_text: "Yes, I have, Lord Captain. Genetor Majoris Ferrenz presented me with a true gift of von Valancius on your behalf. I suppose my status as Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s Arch-Militant had something to do with it. I feel like I've stepped right out of one of the songs!"

traits.locale_text: « Oui, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Le genetor majoris Ferrenz m'a remis un véritable trésor des von Valancius en votre nom. Je suppose que mon statut d'archimilitante de Votre Seigneurie n'y est pas pour rien. J'ai l'impression d'être comme les héros des chansons ! »

languages.text: «Sí, Lord Capitán. El genetor Majoris Ferrenz me entregó un verdadero regalo de los von Valancius en su nombre. Supongo que mi puesto de Archimilitante de mi{mf|lord|lady} estará relacionado con ello. ¡Es como si hubiera salido de una canción!».
languages.original_text: "Yes, I have, Lord Captain. Genetor Majoris Ferrenz presented me with a true gift of von Valancius on your behalf. I suppose my status as Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s Arch-Militant had something to do with it. I feel like I've stepped right out of one of the songs!"

traits.locale_text: «Sí, Lord Capitán. El genetor Majoris Ferrenz me entregó un verdadero regalo de los von Valancius en su nombre. Supongo que mi puesto de Archimilitante de mi{mf|lord|lady} estará relacionado con ello. ¡Es como si hubiera salido de una canción!».
